lifecycle_definitions.AUTHORITATIVE: Must be kept correct; can be required by gates.
lifecycle_definitions.REFERENCE: Helpful but not canonical; must not claim global 'current project status' or repeat volatile metrics.
lifecycle_definitions.HISTORICAL: Snapshot; do not update except for minimal link repairs / disclaimers.

current_status_claims_policy.rule: Only docs/INDEX.md may claim global 'current project status' or host volatile metrics. Other docs must point to docs/INDEX.md and/or facts in this manifest.

ban_list: Do not hardcode volatile counts (e.g. tests: 122 vs 142) across multiple markdown files.
Do not duplicate 'current grade' across multiple docs.
If a metric is needed, store it here with provenance or derive it from commands/logs.
facts_policy.live_vs_history_rule: facts holds current/live values only (auto-updated or human-curated canonical truth). Session-closeout or phase-complete snapshots belong in facts_history. When a live fact is superseded by a new session, move the prior entry into facts_history with its key optionally suffixed by session date.
facts_policy.last_verified_format: Strict ISO YYYY-MM-DD. Do not append annotations such as (FINAL) or session labels.

archive_policy.rule: Do not move/archive/delete docs until the archive investigation gates pass (link graph, duplication clusters, unique-value extraction, inbound reference checks).
